comment.body: FWIW dept.  --  with trading you don't want to get too predictive, but this is the general path i see toward a final top to the market.  There would be 3 new ATH's ending in the TOP.  The two down legs shown would be very sharp, possibly with gaps down.  I don't expect anyone to believe it.  It involves a pattern I've used for years in top formations.  like i said, FWIW

comment.body: Alma, I'm reviewing your OD heatmap chat and I'm having trouble understand how this impacts your analysis of SPX. in this example from 02/04/2025, I went back and looked at the 1min bars and the range was only from 5990.87 to 6040.99, yet you're talking about strikes, GEX, and color wayyyyy beyond those daily levels.
